originalTitle: Live RL Research on PufferLib w/ Joseph Suarez
title: Debugging Deadlocks and Implementing Async CUDA Buffering for PufferLib Vectorization
summary: Worked on a C++ vectorization backend for PufferLib, debugging deadlocks and adding multi-buffered asynchronous CUDA host-device transfers. Developed a threaded manager for async action/observation transfers to eliminate CPU-GPU bottlenecks.
